seo.metaTitle: 24/7 White-Label Technical Support for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Multilingual, multi-channel, 24/7 technical support in your brand. Level 1 through Level 3, retention programs, upsell capabilities, and full reporting.

hero.headline: We Don't Service Partner Customers. We Service Customers.
hero.subheadline: 24/7, multilingual, multi-channel technical support — entirely in your brand. From Level 1 break/fix through Level 3 escalations.

howItWorks.heading: Your Brand. Our Expertise. Their Satisfaction.
howItWorks.intro: White-label customer support that scales with your business. Your customers never know we're involved.

cards.title: 24/7/365 Coverage
cards.body: North American-based agents delivering round-the-clock support across multiple time zones.

cards.title: Multi-Channel
cards.body: Phone, email, and live chat — every channel staffed by agents trained on your products and brand standards.

cards.title: Multilingual
cards.body: Service delivered in multiple languages for global service providers and their customers.

tiers.title: Break/Fix
tiers.body: 24/7 first-contact resolution for common technical issues, account questions, and product guidance — fully white-labeled.

tiers.title: Advanced Support
tiers.body: Platform-level troubleshooting, escalation handling, and complex technical resolution — available standalone.

tiers.title: Flexible Combinations
tiers.body: We run the full stack, or you handle Level 1 and we take Levels 2 and 3. We integrate with your processes either way.

upserve.heading: Support That Drives Revenue
upserve.intro: Every customer interaction is an opportunity. We call it "Upserve" — and it's in our DNA.

cards.title: Upsell in Every Interaction
cards.body: Agents trained to identify upgrade opportunities. A customer calling about their website might benefit from SEO. An email inquiry is a chance to introduce a premium plan.

cards.title: Welcome-to-Service Calls
cards.body: Consultative onboarding to build trust, validate package selection, and introduce add-on services.

cards.title: Retention Programs
cards.body: Proactive outreach to at-risk customers — addressing satisfaction issues and reinforcing value before they consider cancelling.

items.title: Performance Reporting
items.body: Call volumes, resolution rates, CSAT, handle time.

items.title: Proactive Notifications
items.body: We flag trends before they become problems.

items.title: Escalation Desk
items.body: Dedicated Partner Relations team for urgent issues.

items.title: Quality Assurance
items.body: Ongoing monitoring and coaching to maintain your brand standards.

cta.headline: Give Your Customers the Support They Deserve
cta.body: Full 24/7 coverage or Level 2/3 backup — we adapt to your model.
